predictions.reason: Surging global crude oil prices directly boost realizations for upstream oil producers.
Elevated crude oil prices will sharply increase aviation turbine fuel (ATF) costs, impacting airline profitability.
Heightened global geopolitical tensions typically lead to increased defence spending and order visibility for aerospace companies.
Global commodity price inflation and potential supply chain shifts following the Iran conflict could benefit diversified metals and mining companies.
Global risk-off sentiment, weakness in US tech markets, and potential FII outflows could weigh on Indian IT services stocks.
